name: Scotch Oatmeal Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl and mix.
2. In another bowl, combine the milk, eggs, and cooking oil. Mix well.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. For each waffle, pour 1/2 of the batter (1 1/3 cups) into a preheated 9-inch square waffle iron.
5. Spread over the grid at once.
6. Close the iron; bake until done and nicely browned.
7. Serve hot with butter and maple syrup, honey, applesauce, or preserves.
Yield: 2 - 9-inch waffles or 8 - 4-inch waffles.
